presets.label: Existing (before growth)
presets.note: The place as downloaded: existing fabric muted, its mixed-use centres magenta. No simulation has run.

presets.label: Baseline run
presets.note: The scenario's own params.json, as shipped.

presets.label: Shorter centre walk (400 m)
presets.note: Centres serve only a 400 m walk; growth stays tighter around each centre.

presets.label: Longer centre walk (1,600 m)
presets.note: Centres serve a 1,600 m walk; growth reaches much further from each centre.

presets.label: Compact (dispersal off)
presets.note: No leapfrogging: one contiguous settlement.

presets.label: Dispersed (aggressive)
presets.note: Satellites leapfrog readily across the window.

presets.label: Denser mix
presets.note: Shares shifted one step toward the high tier; the same target houses on less land.

presets.label: Tightly clustered centres
presets.note: The same growth, post-processed to fewer, larger mixed-use centres.
